basic_details.job_title: Repco Bank Chief Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Repco Home Finance has officially announced the Chief Manager Recruitment 2026 with openings for eligible candidates. The detailed notification has been released under Advt. No. JULY 2026. Candidates who meet the age criteria of not exceeding 38 years as on 01 July 2026 and hold a graduation degree (10+2+3 format) from a UGC recognized university can apply through Email or Offline mode. The last date to submit the application is 22 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 38 years as on 01-07-2026 (relaxation generally up to 50 years of age can be considered based on commensurate, relevant prior experience for deserving cases based on Management discretion).
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 38 years as on 01-07-2026. Age Relaxation: Up to 50 years based on commensurate, relevant prior experience for deserving cases based on Management discretion.

qualification.education_qualification: Any graduation (10+2+3 format) from a UGC recognized university. Post-graduation & professional qualification shall be given additional weightage.
qualification.details: CHIEF MANAGER: Any graduation (10+2+3 format) from a UGC recognized university. Post-graduation & professional qualification shall be given additional weightage. Minimum 10 years of experience (for age not exceeding 38 years) in collections and recovery in the HFCs/Banks/NBFCs. For further age relaxation, commensurate additional experience would be required. Presently holding a role in the cadre now equivalent to or not lower than that of Manager / Senior Manager cadre.

salary_details.pay_scale: Based on Current CTC + Attractive incentives.
salary_details.details: Based on Current CTC + Attractive incentives.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on prescribed criteria and management discretion Further selection process for shortlisted candidates
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Repco Bank Chief Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:https://www.repcohome.com/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: CHIEF MANAGER: Any graduation (10+2+3 format) from a UGC recognized university. Post-graduation & professional qualification shall be given additional weightage. Minimum 10 years of experience (for age not exceeding 38 years) in collections and recovery in the HFCs/Banks/NBFCs. For further age relaxation, commensurate additional experience would be required. Presently holding a role in the cadre now equivalent to or not lower than that of Manager / Senior Manager cadre.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Repco Bank Chief Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:https://www.repcohome.com/ . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Repco Bank Chief Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Repco Bank Chief Manager post is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Manager position?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold any graduation (10+2+3 format) from a UGC recognized university. Post-graduation and professional qualifications are given additional weightage.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Chief Manager role?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 38 years as on 01-07-2026. However, relaxation up to 50 years is possible for deserving candidates with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Repco Bank Chief Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted via email to [email protected] or by post/courier to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Chief Manager post?
faq.answer: The salary is based on the current CTC plus attractive incentives.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Chief Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Chief Manager post, which is equivalent to the Chief Manager role.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a Full Time job opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. Which region is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the Pune Region.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum experience required for the Chief Manager (Regional Collection Manager) post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 10 years of experience in collections and recovery in HFCs/Banks/NBFCs is required.
